title: Book a Demo
description: Book a live demo tailored to your program. 30 minutes, zero pressure.

hero.heading:
See ScheduleRama
in Action
hero.summary: Fill out the form and we'll set up a 30-minute live walkthrough tailored to your program — whether you're an AD, a league admin, or running a multi-school network.

expectations.title: We review your setup
expectations.body: Tell us how many schools, leagues, and sports you're managing. We'll tailor the demo to match.

expectations.title: Live walkthrough — your use case
expectations.body: A 30-minute demo focused on the workflows that matter most to your role. No feature dump, just what's relevant.

expectations.title: Pricing & onboarding plan
expectations.body: We'll walk through what a rollout looks like and answer any questions about data migration, user setup, or timing.

form.heading: Tell Us About Your Program
form.notesLabel: Anything specific you'd like us to cover?
form.notesPlaceholder: e.g. We're trying to replace a Google Sheets system and need to handle fall and spring seasons for 12 schools...
form.note: We respond within one business day. No spam, no pressure.

success.heading: Demo Request Received!
success.body: Thanks — we'll review your program details and reach out within one business day to find a time that works.
